violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (tomato slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose all of the foods (burgers and some steak items) on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023

The cutting boards on the prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2025

-The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. -The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose all of the foods (burgers) on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets at the walk-in cooler were observed in poor repair. Gasket shall be repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023

Ice buildup observed in the broil station, mid station, and fry station. Ice buildup shall be broken down. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023
